name: Memo
description: Minimal installable naia panel — a local notepad the AI can read and write. Reference template for third-party naia panels (Git URL / Zip install).

tools.name: skill_memo_read
tools.description: Read all memos from the Memo panel. Returns each memo with its timestamp, newest first.

tools.name: skill_memo_write
tools.description: Add a memo, or clear all memos. The change appears in the Memo panel immediately.

text.description: The memo text to add (required when action=add).

action.description: add (default) appends a memo; clear removes every memo.
